title: onagra undulata
intro: Onagra undulata, also known as wild cress or bittercress, is a biennial or short-lived perennial plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant agent. The plant's leaves, stems, and roots are rich in vitamins, minerals, and other nutrients that provide several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, boosting the immune system, and aiding in digestion. Onagra undulata can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves can be used fresh in salads or as a garnish, making it a versatile and useful herbal remedy.
